name: anthril-claude-plugins
description: Official Anthril plugin marketplace — organised into Lifestyle, SMB, Marketing, Engineering, Data Science, Economics, and Utilities

plugins.name: data-analysis
plugins.description: 5 skills for data profiling, quality auditing, pipeline design, cohort analysis, and anomaly detection

plugins.name: business-economics
plugins.description: 5 skills for unit economics, market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), pricing architecture, cost structure, and break-even scenario modelling

plugins.name: strategic-economics
plugins.description: 3 skills for competitive dynamics, elasticity estimation, and moat-strength audit (7 Powers). Includes red-team-strategist agent.

plugins.name: package-manager
plugins.description: Audit npm package publishing quality and CLI terminal UX — publishing/security/build checks plus help-text, error-message, and output-formatting review

plugins.name: utilities
plugins.description: General-purpose utility skills — plan-completion-audit + audit-resolver (closes the audit→fix loop) + 5 repo-ops helpers: changelog-generator, pr-description-writer, env-var-auditor, doc-link-validator, repo-snapshot. Includes /utilities:audit-resolve command.

plugins.name: skill-ops
plugins.description: Operate on Claude Code skills — scaffold (skill-creator), audit against a 10-dimension rubric (skill-evaluator), and run regression-tracked evaluations (skill-eval-harness + skill-eval-bootstrap). Renamed from `skillops` to match the kebab-case convention used by every other plugin.

plugins.name: brand-manager
plugins.description: 9 skills for end-to-end brand creation — identity, guidelines, audience, competitors, logo briefs, colour, design tokens, legal disclaimers, and website copy

plugins.name: software-development
plugins.description: audit/orchestration skills for software teams — stack-agnostic codebase profiler (architecture topology, dependency graph, security surface, quality metrics), dead code detection across 9 languages, end-to-end write path mapping, parallel multi-agent plan orchestration for Plan Mode, multi-agent application audit for Next.js 15 + React 19 + TypeScript Strict + Supabase + Tailwind apps, plus an executable action-plan loop (audit-compile-plan + audit-work) for stepping through validated findings

plugins.name: ppc-manager
plugins.description: 23 skills for end-to-end PPC — Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, and GTM — with OAuth-authenticated read/write across all four platforms via bundled Python MCP servers

plugins.name: database-design
plugins.description: Postgres schema design + audit for Supabase or any Postgres 13+ database. 7 skills covering schema design, ERD generation, RLS, migrations, indexes, schema audit, and Supabase bootstrap. Includes db-reviewer agent and db-bootstrap interactive command.

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: 9 DevOps and SRE skills for audit, remediation, and runtime testing — plain-language needs assessment, CI/CD, Terraform IaC, Docker, Kubernetes, observability, release readiness, DevSecOps supply chain, and SRE reliability. Static-file audit by default; opt-in --live, --apply, --runtime modes

plugins.name: resource-manager
plugins.description: Monitor and reclaim machine resources used by Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and their MCP servers — orphan-killer Stop hook, on-demand audit skills, and a localhost process dashboard

plugins.name: seo-toolkit
plugins.description: 20 skills for end-to-end SEO — research/clustering/mapping, SERP & competitor analysis, on-page + technical audits, CWV, backlinks, content briefs, schema, GSC reporting, local SEO, plus structured-data entity modelling (entity-disambiguation, entity-relationship-mapper, knowledge-graph-builder).

plugins.name: business-operations
plugins.description: 5 skills for SMB operations — channels, KPIs, briefs, bottlenecks, pricing

plugins.name: experimentation
plugins.description: 4 data-science skills for A/B test design, experiment readouts, time-series forecasting, and causal-impact analysis. Includes stats-reviewer peer-review agent.

plugins.name: personal-productivity
plugins.description: 4 lifestyle skills for daily and weekly systems — habit-stacker, sunday-reset, deep-focus-day, energy-detective. Includes lifestyle-onboard interactive wizard.

plugins.name: health-wellness
plugins.description: 5 lifestyle skills for meal planning, training, sleep, supplements, and wellness habits — evidence-rated, AU context, with disclaimer pattern.

plugins.name: personal-finance
plugins.description: 5 lifestyle skills for AU personal finance — budgeting, debt payoff, savings, retirement projection, emergency runbook. AU super/Centrelink/ASIC context; projection-analyst agent.

plugins.name: home-life-logistics
plugins.description: 4 lifestyle skills for travel, household maintenance, life-admin, and gift planning — AU state-by-state compliance, AU FY-aligned quarterly admin sweep.
